---
applyTo: ["**/*.qmd", "Manuscript/**/*.md"]
description: >
  Compatibility adapter for manuscript, Markdown, and Quarto-style narrative
  work in PastHumanImpact.
---

# Manuscript Instructions

Canonical guidance lives in `.ai/manuscript.md`.

Read `.ai/manuscript.md` before editing manuscript or Quarto-style narrative
files. Apply `.ai/r-coding.md` to any R chunks.
